# MVTech

MVTech provides custom business information systems for owner-operated businesses across the United States. We keep the entire paper side of a business organized, tracked, and professionally presented — every document filed, every dollar logged, and a clear report delivered every month. MVTech tracks and organizes records only; it never holds a client's money or moves funds. All work is remote and available nationwide.

## Contact
Phone: 213-444-0024 (call or text)
Website: https://mvtechusa.com
Email: tech@mvtechusa.com

## What We Do
- Document organization — permits, policies, contracts, vendor accounts, employee records, and contacts filed and findable in seconds
- Income tracking — every payment received (Zelle, PayPal, Venmo, Stripe, Square) identified and logged the moment it lands
- Expense tracking — every expense and receipt processed and filed, with bill and renewal dates monitored so nothing lapses
- Monthly operations reports — clear income, expense, and trend reports ready to hand to a tax preparer, lender, or buyer
- Document production — quotes, invoices, forms, and business documents produced as polished, branded PDFs
- Form conversion and document merge — turn a photo or scan into a clean fillable form; combine a stack of forms into one packet filled from a single entry

## How It Works
1. One onboarding call sets everything up — we link the business email and a shared folder for deliverables. The owner changes nothing about how they work.
2. The owner keeps running the business; receipts can be texted in as photos, or nothing at all.
3. Each month the owner receives an operations report plus organized, professional documents.

## Who This Is For
Owner-operators who wear every hat: food trucks, used car lots, home sellers going FSBO, trades, and solo businesses of every kind. Best suited to businesses under roughly six employees whose records live in a pile, a drawer, or the owner's head.

## Trust and Access
- Track, never transact — MVTech works from records only and never holds or moves money, the way an accountant reads the books without touching the bank.
- The client owns everything; access is scoped to the work, granted by the client, and revocable at any time.
- An NDA is available before any records are reviewed.

## Coverage
Nationwide — United States. All work is remote.

## Pricing
One-time onboarding: $495 (covers full setup, document intake, and first-month buildout). Monthly plans: Organized $195, Tracked $395, Wingman $695.

## Topics
Small business bookkeeping, receipt tracking, expense logging, income tracking, document organization, business paperwork, monthly financial reports, vendor management, bill and renewal tracking, invoice and quote creation, fillable forms, owner-operator operations, fractional operations support.
